frameworks.name: AUROS Algorithm Optimization Framework
frameworks.description: Data-driven approach to maximize algorithmic reach across platforms using weighted ranking signals
frameworks.when_to_use: When creating content for Instagram, TikTok, or any algorithm-driven platform
steps: Identify platform-specific highest-weighted signals (saves/shares for TikTok, relationship signals for Instagram)
Create content that triggers top 3 ranking factors within first 24 hours
Optimize for completion rate using hook-retention-payoff structure
Build relationship signals through consistent engagement with target audience
Track performance against platform benchmarks and adjust
frameworks.example: TikTok video optimized for saves: Educational content with actionable tip + clear save prompt = 15% save rate vs 2% average

frameworks.name: 5-Category Shareability Matrix
frameworks.description: Instagram's revealed framework for creating highly shareable content
frameworks.when_to_use: When developing content strategy for maximum organic reach
steps: Choose primary category: Gift, Mirror, Idea, Gossip, or Mood
Craft content that triggers specific emotional response
Include clear share trigger in caption or visual
Test across categories to identify audience preference
frameworks.example: The Gift: 'This productivity hack is perfect for your entrepreneur friend' - triggers 40% higher share rate

frameworks.name: Watch Time Optimization Protocol
frameworks.description: Systematic approach to maximize video completion rates across platforms
frameworks.when_to_use: For all video content on TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts
steps: Hook within first 3 seconds using pattern interrupt or bold claim
Structure content with retention spikes every 7-10 seconds
Use visual/audio changes to maintain attention
End with clear next action to encourage rewatches
A/B test different hook styles for audience optimization
frameworks.example: 90-second video with 85% completion rate using 3-second hook + 4 retention spikes + rewatch CTA

key_principles.explanation: TikTok: User interactions 70%, video info 20%, device settings 10%. Instagram: Relationship signals > engagement > recency > content type
key_principles.application: Prioritize saves/shares over likes. Build genuine relationships through consistent engagement before pushing content

key_principles.explanation: Platforms now prioritize meaningful interactions (saves, shares, quality comments) over vanity metrics (likes, follows)
key_principles.application: Create content that demands action: tutorials that get saved, insights that get shared, questions that generate discussion

key_principles.explanation: Algorithms test each piece of content with small audiences before broader distribution, regardless of account size
key_principles.application: Focus on making each post exceptional rather than relying on follower count. New accounts can achieve viral reach with quality content

key_principles.explanation: Each platform has distinct ranking systems - no universal social media strategy works optimally
key_principles.application: Adapt content format, timing, and engagement tactics to each platform's specific algorithm preferences and user behavior patterns

tactics.description: Create reference-worthy content that users want to return to: tutorials, templates, resource lists, step-by-step guides
tactics.expected_result: 10-15% save rate vs 2-3% platform average, leading to 3x higher reach

tactics.description: Use pattern interrupts, bold claims, or visual surprises in opening 3 seconds to stop scroll behavior
tactics.expected_result: 80%+ completion rate vs 45% average, triggering algorithm boost

tactics.description: Consistently engage with target audience's content through meaningful comments and DMs before posting own content
tactics.expected_result: 40% higher reach to engaged accounts, improved feed placement

tactics.description: Include target keywords naturally in first 125 characters, use relevant hashtags strategically (5-10 for Instagram, 3-5 for TikTok)
tactics.expected_result: 25% increase in discovery through search, longer content lifespan

tactics.description: End videos with 'Wait, did you catch that?' or include blink-and-miss details that encourage multiple views
tactics.expected_result: 30% rewatch rate, strongest algorithm signal for content quality

templates.name: High-Save Educational Post
templates.template: [Bold claim/statistic] Here's how to [achieve specific outcome]: 1. [Actionable step] 2. [Actionable step] 3. [Actionable step] Save this for later and follow for more [niche] tips!
templates.use_case: Educational content optimized for saves across all platforms

templates.name: 3-Second Hook Formula
templates.template: [Pattern interrupt: 'Stop scrolling if...' OR Bold claim: 'This [thing] will [dramatic outcome]' OR Question: 'Why does [surprising fact]?'] [Deliver on promise in next 7 seconds]
templates.use_case: Video content hooks for TikTok and Instagram Reels

templates.name: Share-Trigger Caption
templates.template: [Relatable situation/problem] [Your solution/insight] Tag someone who needs to see this! [Relevant hashtags]
templates.use_case: Content designed to trigger shares and tags

templates.name: Algorithm-Friendly Question Post
templates.template: [Context/setup] What's your take: [Option A] or [Option B]? Comment below - I read every single one! [Relevant hashtags]
templates.use_case: Engagement-driving posts that generate quality comments

common_mistakes: Focusing on follower count over engagement quality - algorithms prioritize interaction rates
Using identical content across platforms - each algorithm rewards platform-specific optimization
Posting without engaging first - relationship signals require genuine interaction before content push
Ignoring completion rates - watch time is the strongest ranking signal for video content
Over-hashtagging - 5-10 relevant hashtags outperform 20+ generic ones
Buying engagement - algorithms detect and penalize artificial interactions
Posting inconsistently - algorithms favor accounts with regular, predictable content schedules
pro_tips: Post when your specific audience is most active, not general 'best times' - check your analytics for personalized timing
Create content series that encourage users to follow for the next part - builds relationship signals
Use trending audio on TikTok within first 24 hours of trend emergence for maximum algorithm boost
Reply to every comment within first 2 hours of posting - early engagement velocity triggers algorithm amplification
Cross-pollinate audiences by collaborating with accounts that share your audience but aren't direct competitors
Create 'gateway content' - easily consumable posts that introduce your expertise to new audiences
Track your top-performing content's common elements and systematically replicate those patterns
Use Instagram Stories to drive traffic to feed posts - Stories engagement improves overall account performance
